aliases.label: MMX
aliases.notes: MMX is the Class of 2010 tournament entry.

aliases.label: GAMETIME
aliases.notes: GAMETIME is the Class of 2007 tournament entry.

aliases.label: 12 Pack
aliases.notes: 2026 tournament entry combining Class of 2012 and Class of 2017.
Older-class combined tournament entry represented by classes 1990, 1993, 1994, and 1995. The 2026 schedule may shorten this to 435.

aliases.label: AD7
aliases.notes: AD7 is the Class of 1987 tournament entry name. Combined labels such as 82/86/AD7 resolve to the numeric classes plus Class of 1987.
815 is shorthand for 08/15, representing Classes 2008 and 2015.
